blurb: Speaks little, endures much. Relies on discipline over feeling.
Charges first, considers second. Risk isn't something to manage — it's something to court.
Puts the squad first, always. Will not leave someone behind.
Has seen too much to be surprised. Takes the work, doubts the cause.
Finds something to like in almost any situation. Others find it either infectious or annoying.
Quiet, focused, and humourless. The job is the job.
Measures twice, cuts once. Hesitation has kept this one alive when others haven't.
Reputation matters. Does not accept failure quietly.
